nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Josiah and his deeds of devotion as written in the law of the Lord,

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Josiah, and his good deeds according to what is written in the Law of the Lord,

cnv.text: 約西亞其餘的事蹟，和他按著耶和華律法上所記而行的善事，

ccb.text: 约西亚其他的事迹和他怎样忠心地遵行耶和华的律法，
